items.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo a global health emergency
items.summary: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.

items.title: Hezbollah drone strike videos show evolving tactics against Israel
items.summary: BBC Verify has examined dozens of videos of fibre-optic drone attacks carried out by the Lebanese armed group.

items.title: Taiwan insists it is independent after Trump warning
items.summary: Fresh from his summit in Beijing, the US president warned against a formal declaration of independence by the island.

items.title: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
items.summary: In Ukraine, local officials report eight injured in overnight Russian drone strikes and shelling.

items.title: Man drives car into pedestrians in Italy, injuring eight
items.summary: Eight people were injured, four seriously, before passers-by gave chase and stopped the man.

items.title: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
items.summary: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.

items.title: Whale found dead near Danish island after German rescue operation
items.summary: Wildlife experts had previous criticised the operation, saying it would only cause the animal more distress.

items.title: Trump-backed challenger defeats Republican senator who voted to convict president
items.summary: Trump threw his full support behind Julia Letlow in Louisiana's high-stakes contest, branding the incumbent "disloyal".

items.title: Canadian from hantavirus-hit cruise ship tests positive
items.summary: The individual is one of four former passengers on the MV Hondius isolating on Vancouver Island, British Columbia.

items.title: Toddlers among more than 50 schoolchildren kidnapped in Nigeria
items.summary: No group has yet claimed responsibility for the attacks, which have devastated Mussa town in Borno state.

items.title: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say
items.summary: President Donald Trump said the operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.

items.title: US planning to charge ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
items.summary: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.

items.title: Switzerland to open secret files on Auschwitz 'Angel of Death' Mengele
items.summary: Mengele fled Europe after the war but for years there were rumours he spent time in Switzerland.

items.title: Lebanon says six killed in Israeli strike as US announces ceasefire extension
items.summary: President Trump announced the truce last month, but Israel and Hezbollah have continued to exchange fire since then.

items.title: Freight train and bus crash kills at least eight in Bangkok
items.summary: Police and rescue officials said the collision sparked a fire that engulfed the bus.

items.title: Foreign tourists are falling out of love with Goa - here's why
items.summary: Foreign visitors to Goa have nearly halved from their pre-Covid peak even as domestic tourism is booming.

items.title: Secret police and propaganda: The Chinese agents spying on expats in US
items.summary: Experts say two espionage cases in the US highlight China's attempts to peddle influence globally over the past decade.

items.title: 'Look Mum, one point': Why does the UK keep getting Eurovision wrong?
items.summary: After four years of flops, the BBC has to think hard about how it approaches Eurovision in 2027.

items.title: The girl group who've sold out venues and toured the world - without releasing a record
items.summary: The all-female supergroup has sold out venues across the UK and Ireland, toured stadiums with Ed Sheeran, and built a global following - all without releasing a debut record.

items.title: What China critics in Maga movement make of Trump's Beijing trip
items.summary: Trump’s softer approach towards China is one that experts say will likely trickle down to the wider MAGA base.

items.title: Lights, camera, Bangaranga: Highlights from Eurovision
items.summary: Bulgarian singer Dara stormed to victory in the contest, while Ukraine broke the record for the longest note ever sung at Eurovision.

items.title: Watch: What did we learn from Trump's visit to China?
items.summary: President Trump has concluded a two-day visit to Beijing at a high-stakes summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

items.title: BBC on the ground during march through Jerusalem's Old City
items.summary: Tens of thousands of Israeli celebrants have marched through the area captured by Israel in the 1967 Arab-Israeli war.

items.title: Hundreds of illegal motorbikes bulldozed in New York City crime crackdown
items.summary: A moped had been used in the deadly stray-bullet shooting of a 7-month-old in Brooklyn last month, officials said.

items.title: The Kabul rehab centre hit by deadly Pakistani strike
items.summary: Pakistan says it hit 'military and terrorist infrastructure' - but the UN and victims' families reject this claim.
